overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in period clothing walking through a historic European-style city during golden hour. The character passes classical monuments including an equestrian statue and a tall column before entering a narrow stone passage between high walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city boulevard with classical monuments

character passes the large equestrian statue on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the historic street toward the column monument, passing an equestrian statue

entered.detail: multi-story classical stone building with columns and arched windows
historic stone building with multiple floors and classical facade
tall stone column with statue on top, mounted on a large square pedestal
large bronze statue of a figure on horseback on a stone pedestal
tall black ornate street lamp post

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide historic city street lined with classical stone buildings during golden hour. The camera approaches a tall column monument and passes a large equestrian statue on the left, with warm sunlight casting long shadows across the paved street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone passage between high walls

events.description: entering narrow enclosed passage between high stone walls, leaving the open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow stone corridor, moving toward a distant building visible at the end

entered.detail: tall stone block wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall weathered stone wall forming the right side of the passage
building facade visible at the end of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow stone passage between high walls, leaving the open street and monuments behind. The space becomes enclosed with limited sky visibility, and the character walks toward a distant building visible at the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sun-drenched historic plaza into the claustrophobic confines of a narrow stone corridor. It begins by trailing a character along a broad city street lined with classical stone buildings, passing a large equestrian statue and a towering column monument under the warm glow of golden hour. As the character moves forward, the open expanse of the paved street and its long shadows gradually give way to a tight passage between high walls. The scene then shifts from the bright, airy atmosphere of the monuments to an enclosed space with limited sky visibility, finally focusing on a distant building visible at the end of the stone corridor.
